mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, role, status, email_verified, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, role, status, email_verified, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, role, status, email_verified, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password_hash, role, status, email_verified) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{status}, #{emailVerified})
